top_signals.title: ‘Downright offensive’: Southwark council slammed for blocking 900 homes
top_signals.summary: Southwark council has been blasted for celebrating the blocking of an 867-home development on the site of a Peckham shopping centre.  The local authority hailed a “great day for Peckham” after housebuilder Berkeley failed to overturn a ruling against the development, which would have delivered retail, leisure and commercial space alongside the hundreds of homes. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Modular data center builder Armada raises $230 million, to build new Arizona factory with new investor Johnson Controls
top_signals.summary: Modular data center builder Armada has raised $230 million from investors at a valuation of $2 billion, with BlackRock becoming a new investor.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: The AI Boom Is a Dilemma for Retail Investors
top_signals.summary: AI may be a fantastic long-term investment, but today’s frothy atmosphere increases the chances of real pain along the way.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
